name: Bow of the Void
description: Notes This bow possesses very high DPS, at the cost of having 1 tile lower range than tiered bows and only slightly more than tiered daggers. But since it only fires 1 shot, its true range (6 tiles) is higher than tiered bows, and gains the full benefit from Inspired buffs. This allows the Void bow to deal more consistent damage from a safer distance.
